text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I do feel like I've improved... But I feel good
because I learned something important!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That's still a secret for now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But who knows? Maybe something special will
happen at the Sprinters Stakes. ♪ You'll just have
to wait and see.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe, that's what I like to hear. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! By the way, I heard there's a great little
gelato place around here no one knows about.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
A fan told me about it in my comments. I'd really
like to check it out.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I did my best during training, so... why don't we
sneak off and try it?

She says it's within walking distance, and we still
have a little bit of time until the bus leaves, so...
choice_data_list: Then that'll be your training reward!
Then that'll be your training reward!

text_block_list.text:
Our hot summer training ends with a delicious cup
of gelato.
